title: The Weight of Glory
author: C.S. Lewis
content: “It is a serious thing to live in a society of possible gods and goddesses.”

title: Orthodoxy
author: G.K. Chesterton
content: “An adventure is only an inconvenience rightly considered. An inconvenience is only an adventure wrongly considered.”

title: The Brothers Karamazov
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
content: “The mystery of human existence lies not in just staying alive, but in finding something to live for.”

title: City of God
author: Saint Augustine
content: “If we live well, times are good. We are the times: such as we are, such are the times.”

title: Grace and Grit
author: Ken Wilber
content: “Death is not the opposite of life; it is a part of life.”
